name: Mexican Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the rice until golden brown (this is important for flavor). Be careful once it starts turning brown, as it will burn quickly.
2. Traditionally, you would fry in oil, but a dry non-stick skillet works well and produces good results.
3. Once the rice is golden brown, add all remaining ingredients and cook until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is cooked through.
The garlic, cilantro, and black pepper can be added to taste. Crush canned tomatoes and do not add any additional liquid if desired. For a redder color, you may add paprika, as my mother-in-law does with her dishes.
